titleStmt.title: SII 34.339: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 339. Nāṅgupaṭṭi (Maḍattukkōyil), Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the west wall of the first prākāra of the Maḍattukkōyil temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Parakēsarivarman Tribhuvanavīradēva (Kulōttuṅga III), 35th year = A.D. 1213.

Gift of the village Puṉṉaṅguḍi to the temple of Tirupperumāṉāṇḍa-Nāyaṉār for worship and repairs, by an araiyan of Kōṉāḍu called Ūruḍaipperumāḷ alias Edirilichōḻa-Kaḍambarāyaṉ praying for the safety of the king during his visit (perhaps some military expedition) to Madurai. The village was subsequently renamed Udaiyapperumāḷ-nallūr after the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kOpparakEcaripanmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ Īḻamum maturaiyum
pāṇṭiyan muṭittalaiyum koṇṭu maturaiyum vīrābhiṣēkam vicai
ya Abhiṣēkamum paṇṇi Aruḷiṉa tiripuvaṉavīra tēvaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 5 vatu
koṉāṭāṉa kaṭalaṭaiyātilaṅkai koṇṭa cōḻa vaḷanāṭṭu Iṉṉā
ṭṭu Araiyakaḷil Ūruṭaipperumāṉāṉa Etirili cōḻakkaṭam
parāyaṉēṉ Ulakuṭaiya nāyinār maturaikku Eḻuntaruḷiṉāl tirumēṉikku na
ṉṟāka Uṭaiyār tirupperumāṉāṇṭa nāyaṉārṟku pūcaikkum tiruppa
ṇikkum Uṭalāka nāṉ pirātticcu viṭakkaṭavatāna nilattukku piḷḷaiyār tirukka
ymalaril nīrvārttu kuṭutta puṉṉaṅkuṭiyum puṉṉaṅkuṭi Uḷḷi
ṭṭa kuṭikkāṭukaḷum tirukkaimalarilē nīrvāttuk kuṭuttu cōḻakōṉār pē
rāl Utayapperumāḷ nallūreṉap pērummiṭṭut tiruccūlakkal
lu nāṭṭikkuṭutta puṉṉaṅkuṭik kicaiñca kīḻpāṟkellai Ā
vatu tiripuvaṉavīran peruvaḻikkum māṅkuṭi vayalukku mēṟkum
tenpāṟkellai Aṟumaṅkuṭi Ellaikku vaṭakkum mēṟpāṟkellai
maiyāṇṭi cari Ellaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai
tteṟkum
Digital edition of SII 34.339 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
